news.headline: Will another film star be able to sway the election in India’s Tamil Nadu?
news.summary: Political commentators believe C Joseph Vijay can at best be a disruptor in what has become a three-cornered contest.

news.headline: Dozens of Israeli settlers cross into Syria to demand settlement
news.summary: Dozens of Israeli settlers crossed into Syrian territory in the Golan Heights and barricaded themselves on a rooftop.
